heading: Estrogenic substances screening program
label: 300j–17 Estrogenic substances screening program
text: In addition to the substances referred to in the Administrator may provide for testing under the screening program authorized by , in accordance with the provisions of , of any other substance that may be found in sources of drinking water if the Administrator determines that a substantial population may be exposed to such substance.section 346a(p)(3)(B) of title 21section 346a(p) of title 21section 346a(p) of title 21
